title: Panang Gratin Bites
description: A fusion of French and Thai flavors in a bite-sized gratin. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: french cheese (such as Comté or Gruyère)

instructions: Prepare the panang paste and mustardy paste by mixing them together in a small bowl.
Arrange the miniature gratin cups on a baking sheet.
Spoon a small amount of the panang-mustardy paste mixture into each gratin cup.
Add a sprinkle of shredded cheese on top of the paste.
Place a few miniature breadcrumbs on top of the cheese.
Pour a small amount of cream into each gratin cup.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
